title: Bromelica cepacea
intro:
I couldn't find any information on the plant "Bromelica cepacea." However, I found information on "Bromelia cepacea," also known as the "Dragon Fruit Cactus." 

Here's a paragraph about the plant "Bromelia cepacea":

Bromelia cepacea, also known as the Dragon Fruit Cactus, is a type of epiphytic plant native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Bromelia cepacea include flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Bromelia cepacea include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat respiratory issues and other health conditions.
